hero.title: AI-Powered Knowledge Base for
hero.subtitle: Transform clinical workflows with an intelligent chatbot that delivers evidence-based answers from your medical knowledge base, drug databases, and clinical guidelines — instantly and accurately.
hero.mockQuestion: What are the latest guidelines for managing Type 2 Diabetes with GLP-1 agonists?
hero.mockAnswer: Based on the ADA 2026 Standards of Care, GLP-1 receptor agonists are recommended as first-line injectable therapy for T2DM patients with established ASCVD or high cardiovascular risk. Key agents include semaglutide and liraglutide.
hero.mockCitation: Source: ADA Standards of Care 2026, Section 9 — Pharmacologic Approaches to Glycemic Treatment
hero.inputPlaceholder: Ask about clinical guidelines, drug interactions...

features.label: Capabilities
features.title: Built for Healthcare Teams
features.subtitle: Every feature designed to meet the rigorous demands of clinical environments, from security compliance to real-time medical knowledge retrieval.

ragChat.title: RAG-Powered Clinical Chat
ragChat.desc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation delivers accurate, citation-backed answers from your uploaded medical documents, formularies, and clinical protocols.

docSearch.title: Intelligent Document Search
docSearch.desc: Semantic search across thousands of clinical documents, research papers, and SOPs — find the exact information in seconds.

hipaa.title: HIPAA & Compliance Ready
hipaa.desc: End-to-end encryption, audit logging, role-based access control, and data residency options to meet healthcare regulatory requirements.

multiTurn.title: Multi-Turn Conversations
multiTurn.desc: Context-aware dialogue that remembers previous questions, enabling natural follow-up queries about patient care protocols.

knowledgeBase.title: Centralized Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.desc: Upload and manage clinical guidelines, drug databases, hospital SOPs, and training materials in one secure, searchable repository.

realtime.title: Real-Time Streaming
realtime.desc: Instant streaming responses with server-sent events for a seamless conversational experience — no waiting for full generation.

audit.title: Complete Audit Trail
audit.desc: Every query, response, and document access is logged for compliance auditing, quality assurance, and usage analytics.

roleAccess.title: Role-Based Access Control
roleAccess.desc: Granular permissions for physicians, nurses, pharmacists, and administrators — each sees only what they need.

multilang.title: Multilingual Support
multilang.desc: Serve diverse patient populations and international staff with built-in support for English, Vietnamese, Japanese, and more.

useCases.label: Use Cases
useCases.title: Healthcare Scenarios We Solve
useCases.subtitle: From bedside clinical decisions to back-office compliance, our AI chatbot empowers every role in the healthcare ecosystem.

clinical.title: Clinical Decision Support
clinical.desc: Physicians and nurses get instant access to treatment protocols, drug dosing guidelines, and differential diagnosis support at the point of care.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy & Drug Information
pharmacy.desc: Pharmacists query drug interactions, contraindications, and formulary alternatives in real-time during medication review.

patient.title: Patient Education
patient.desc: Generate patient-friendly explanations of diagnoses, procedures, and medication instructions in multiple languages.

training.title: Medical Staff Training
training.desc: New staff onboarding with an AI tutor that answers questions from hospital policies, safety protocols, and best practices.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.desc: Instantly retrieve and cross-reference regulatory requirements, accreditation standards, and internal policy documents.

operations.title: Hospital Operations
operations.desc: Streamline administrative queries about scheduling protocols, supply chain procedures, and operational guidelines.

sdlc.label: Development Process
sdlc.title: Healthcare SDLC Methodology
sdlc.subtitle: We follow a rigorous, compliance-first software development lifecycle tailored for healthcare products, ensuring patient safety and data integrity at every stage.

discovery.title: Discovery & Requirements
discovery.desc: Stakeholder interviews with clinicians, compliance officers, and IT teams. Define user stories, regulatory requirements (HIPAA, HL7 FHIR), and clinical workflow mappings.

design.title: Architecture & Design
design.desc: Design HIPAA-compliant data architecture, RAG pipeline topology, role-based access models, and UI/UX wireframes validated by clinical end-users.

develop.title: Agile Development
develop.desc: Two-week sprints with continuous integration. Modular monorepo architecture (Express + React), automated code quality gates, and security-first coding standards.

test.title: Clinical Validation & QA
test.desc: Multi-layered testing: unit, integration, E2E, penetration testing, and clinical accuracy validation against gold-standard medical references.

deploy.title: Secure Deployment
deploy.desc: Zero-downtime deployments to HIPAA-compliant infrastructure. Blue-green deployment strategy with automated rollback and health monitoring.

iterate.title: Monitor & Iterate
iterate.desc: Continuous monitoring of AI response quality, user feedback loops with clinical staff, and quarterly compliance re-certification cycles.

compliance.title: Compliance-First Development
compliance.desc: Every line of code, every deployment, and every data flow is designed to meet the strictest healthcare compliance standards from day one — not as an afterthought.

deployment.label: Deployment Options
deployment.title: Deploy Your Way — Cloud, Hybrid, or On-Premise
deployment.subtitle: Choose the deployment model that fits your organization's security requirements, data residency policies, and infrastructure strategy.

cloud.title: Cloud Managed
cloud.desc: Fully managed SaaS deployment on HIPAA-compliant cloud infrastructure. Zero maintenance overhead — we handle scaling, updates, and security patches.

hybrid.title: Hybrid Cloud
hybrid.desc: Keep sensitive patient data on-premise while leveraging cloud AI compute. The best of both worlds for organizations with strict data residency requirements.
features: PHI stays in your data center

onPremise.title: On-Premise
onPremise.desc: Full air-gapped deployment within your own infrastructure. Complete control over data, network, and compute — ideal for government and military healthcare.
features: Run on your own GPU/CPU clusters

architecture.title: Infrastructure-Agnostic Architecture
architecture.desc: Built on containerized microservices with Docker and Kubernetes, our platform deploys identically across any environment. Use Helm charts, Terraform modules, or our CLI installer for repeatable, auditable deployments.

diagram.cloudDesc: AWS / Azure / GCP — Managed K8s, Object Storage, LLM APIs
diagram.hybridDesc: Encrypted tunnels, data sync, split inference pipeline
diagram.onPremiseDesc: Private K8s, local GPU cluster, air-gapped storage

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Healthcare Knowledge Management?
cta.subtitle: Join leading healthcare organizations using AI-powered knowledge bases to improve clinical outcomes, reduce errors, and accelerate decision-making.

footer.description: AI-powered knowledge base and chatbot platform built specifically for healthcare organizations.
